question: ১৯৭০ সালের জন্য, রাজ্যের নাম অনুসারে বর্ণানুক্রমিকভাবে সাজানো, চাল এবং ভুট্টার গড় ফলনের একটি রাজ্যভিত্তিক বিভাজন প্রদান করুন।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, AVG(T2.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA), AVG(T3.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID AND T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR = '1970' GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    g.STATE_NAME,
    AVG(c.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) AS average_rice_yield,
    AVG(cm.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) AS average_maize_yield
FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY g
JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR c ON g.GEOGRAPHY_ID = c.GEOGRAPHY_ID
JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR cm ON g.GEOGRAPHY_ID = cm.GEOGRAPHY_ID AND c.YEAR_ID = cm.YEAR_ID
JOIN DIM_YEAR y ON c.YEAR_ID = y.YEAR_ID
WHERE y.YEAR = 1970
GROUP BY g.STATE_NAME
ORDER BY g.STATE_NAME;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    g.STATE_NAME,
    AVG(c.RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) AS average_rice_yield,
    AVG(cm.MAIZE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA) AS average_maize_yield
FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY g
JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR c ON g.GEOGRAPHY_ID = c.GEOGRAPHY_ID
JOIN FACT_CEREALS_MINOR cm ON g.GEOGRAPHY_ID = cm.GEOGRAPHY_ID AND c.YEAR_ID = cm.YEAR_ID
JOIN DIM_YEAR y ON c.YEAR_ID = y.YEAR_ID
WHERE y.YEAR = 1970
GROUP BY g.STATE_NAME
ORDER BY g.STATE_NAME;
